        10X® Styling Iron
      










Add
 - 


$239












































The vibrating plates glide through hair creating increased surface contact, smoothing and polishing each strand.


Additional Information


This revolutionary styling iron is equipped with sonic vibrating plates infused with Volcanic MX that style hair in less than 10 minutes. Bio Ionic Moisturizing Heat™ Technology conditions hair as you style, sealing in moisture and smoothing the cuticle, for softer, healthier strands. A rounded barrel makes it easy to use this multitasking tool for wavy or straight styles. The result is an unparalleled vibrant, high gloss finish.




How to Use


Use the rounded-tip plate design to smooth short hairs around the hairline.






Specs and Features


Silicone Speed Strips: No
Ceramic Mineral Complex: Yes
BioCeramic MCH Heater: Yes
Far Infrared Heat: Yes
Sonic Vibration: Yes
Adjustable Heat: Yes
Swivel Cord: Yes
Automatic Shut-Off: 1 hour
Wattage Rating: 45
Temperature: 450
Weight (without cord): 10 oz
Cord Length: 9 ft
Warranty Length: 5 Year Warranty
Universal Voltage: Yes
